case_summary: Neighbor built a fence 2 feet inside my agricultural land boundary.
reasoning: Boundary disputes require legal verification of land ownership and court-appointed survey.
steps: File civil suit under Order VII CPC

case_summary: My neighbor shifted boundary stones on my 3-acre land without permission.
reasoning: Illegal shifting of boundary markers requires civil court intervention and resurvey.
steps: File civil suit for declaration of boundary

case_summary: My relative is claiming 1 acre of my paddy field is within his land.
reasoning: Disputed boundary between relatives requires civil suit and title verification.

case_summary: A road was constructed through my land without any official notice or compensation.
reasoning: Unauthorized road construction on private land requires civil court for compensation.

case_summary: My neighbor claims the wall separating our properties belongs to him.
reasoning: Ownership of boundary wall is a civil dispute requiring title verification.

case_summary: Government survey shows my plot is 0.5 acres smaller than my registered area.
reasoning: Discrepancy between registered and actual area requires civil court for correction.
steps: File suit for correction of records

case_summary: Two village maps show different boundaries for my agricultural plot.
reasoning: Map discrepancy in village records is handled by revenue department for correction.
steps: Apply to Tehsildar for map correction

case_summary: My uncle encroached 1 acre and planted crops claiming it is part of his land.
reasoning: Disputed cultivation rights require civil court to establish correct boundary.
steps: File civil suit for recovery of possession

case_summary: मेरे पड़ोसी ने मेरी ज़मीन की सीमा पर अवैध निर्माण कर दिया है।
reasoning: सीमा विवाद में सिविल कोर्ट में वाद दाखिल करना आवश्यक है।
steps: सिविल कोर्ट में वाद दाखिल करें

case_summary: मेरे खेत की मेड़ बदलकर पड़ोसी ने 2 बीघा जमीन कब्जा कर ली है।
reasoning: खेत की सीमा बदलने का विवाद सिविल न्यायालय के अधीन है।
steps: सिविल कोर्ट में स्थायी निषेधाज्ञा हेतु वाद दायर करें
न्यायालय द्वारा सर्वे का अनुरोध करें

case_summary: My uncle is claiming my father's inherited 5-acre agricultural land after his death.
reasoning: Inheritance disputes over property require civil court under Succession Act.
steps: File civil suit to establish legal heirship
Submit death certificate and legal heir certificate

case_summary: My brother claims the will is forged and demands equal share in father's land.
reasoning: Will validity disputes require civil court under Indian Succession Act.
steps: File suit for probate of will
Submit original will and witness affidavits
Request handwriting expert if forgery alleged

case_summary: My grandfather's land was not transferred to my father's name despite being the only son.
reasoning: Mutation of land records after inheritance is handled by revenue department.
steps: Apply for mutation at Tehsildar office
Submit death certificate and legal heir documents

case_summary: After my husband died, his brothers are claiming his land, ignoring my rights as wife.
reasoning: Widow's inheritance rights require civil court intervention under Hindu Succession Act.
steps: File suit declaring widow's inheritance rights
Submit marriage certificate and death certificate
Apply for interim injunction on property

case_summary: Three brothers are fighting over a 10-acre plot inherited from their father with no written will.
reasoning: Intestate succession dispute requires civil court for partition and declaration.
steps: Submit revenue records and family tree
Court will appoint commissioner for partition

case_summary: Daughter-in-law is claiming share in joint family agricultural land after husband's death.
reasoning: Succession rights in joint family property require civil court adjudication.
steps: File for share in joint property

case_summary: My father's second wife is claiming half of his property, denying us our share.
reasoning: Multiple claimants to inheritance require civil court for proper division.

case_summary: Adopted son is being denied share in property by biological children after father's death.
reasoning: Adopted child's rights in inheritance are protected under Hindu law via civil court.
steps: File civil suit for declaration of rights

case_summary: मेरे चाचा ने दादाजी की जमीन पर झूठे दस्तावेज बनाकर कब्जा कर लिया है।
reasoning: जाली दस्तावेजों से संपत्ति हड़पना सिविल और आपराधिक दोनों मामला है।

case_summary: पिताजी के निधन के बाद बड़े भाई ने अकेले ही जमीन अपने नाम करा ली।
reasoning: अन्य उत्तराधिकारियों की सहमति के बिना जमीन ट्रांसफर करना गलत है, सिविल कोर्ट से राहत मिलेगी।

case_summary: Tenant has not paid rent for 8 months and refuses to vacate my house.
reasoning: Tenancy disputes for eviction and rent recovery are handled through revenue/rent authority.

Submit rent agreement and payment ledger

case_summary: My tenant has sublet my property to another person without my knowledge.
reasoning: Unauthorized subletting is a ground for eviction under rent control law.
steps: File eviction case citing unauthorized subletting

case_summary: Tenant is running a commercial shop in a property rented for residential use.
reasoning: Misuse of rented premises is eviction ground under rent control legislation.
steps: Submit rent agreement specifying residential use

case_summary: Landlord is forcibly trying to evict me despite valid rent agreement still in force.
reasoning: Tenant's protection against illegal eviction is under Rent Control Act.

case_summary: Tenant damaged walls and flooring of my house and refuses to pay for repairs.
reasoning: Property damage by tenant is grounds for eviction and compensation via rent authority.

case_summary: Landlord increased rent by 50% suddenly without any prior notice.
reasoning: Arbitrary rent hike without proper notice violates Rent Control Act.

case_summary: Agriculture land given on lease for 3 years; tenant now refuses to return after lease expired.
reasoning: Recovery of agricultural land from tenant after lease expiry requires civil court.
steps: File civil suit for recovery of possession

case_summary: किरायेदार ने मकान में मंजिल जोड़ दी बिना मेरी अनुमति के।

case_summary: Someone illegally occupied my 2-acre agricultural land while I was abroad.
reasoning: Illegal occupation of land requires civil court for recovery of possession.
steps: File civil suit for recovery of possession

case_summary: My neighbor has built a permanent structure encroaching 3 feet into my plot.
reasoning: Permanent encroachment requires civil court for mandatory injunction to remove structure.

case_summary: Local politician encroached and fenced off my farmland of 4 acres.
reasoning: Encroachment by any person requires civil court; police complaint also advisable.

case_summary: Villagers are using my private land as a common path claiming it is a public road.
reasoning: Private land being claimed as public road needs civil court declaration.

case_summary: Builder illegally used part of my plot for construction of apartment building.
reasoning: Builder encroachment requires civil court for injunction and damages.

case_summary: Government officials wrongly marked my privately owned land as government land.
reasoning: Erroneous government classification of private land requires civil court challenge.

reasoning: Possession of land by trespasser requires civil suit for recovery.
steps: File suit for recovery of possession

भूमि के मूल दस्तावेज प्रस्तुत करें
अंतरिम निषेधाज्ञा के लिए आवेदन करें

case_summary: किसी ने मेरे खाली खेत पर झोपड़ी बनाकर कब्जा कर लिया है।
reasoning: खेत पर अतिक्रमण सिविल मामला है, कोर्ट से आदेश लेना आवश्यक है।
steps: सिविल कोर्ट में वाद दायर करें
राजस्व रिकॉर्ड और नक्शा प्रस्तुत करें
पुलिस में शिकायत भी दर्ज करें

case_summary: Seller sold the same agricultural land to me and another buyer simultaneously.

Apply for interim injunction against other buyer

case_summary: Builder took full payment for a plot but refused to register it in my name.

case_summary: Seller did not disclose that the land had a court dispute before selling it to me.
reasoning: Non-disclosure of encumbrance by seller is fraud; civil court can annul sale.

case_summary: A power of attorney holder sold my land without my consent or knowledge.
reasoning: Unauthorized sale by power of attorney holder is fraudulent and voidable in civil court.
steps: File suit to cancel the sale deed

case_summary: Registration of land I purchased is being blocked by sub-registrar without valid reason.
reasoning: Wrongful refusal of registration can be challenged in civil court by mandamus.

case_summary: I paid advance for a plot in a layout but the developer has disappeared.
reasoning: Developer fraud in real estate is a consumer dispute for refund with interest.

case_summary: Land sold to me has encroachment by a third party not disclosed by seller.

Submit sale deed and encumbrance certificate

case_summary: Bank seized and auctioned my land for a loan I had already repaid.

case_summary: Bank is charging higher interest rate than agreed in the original loan document.

case_summary: Bank sent recovery agents who threatened my family and damaged property.
reasoning: Illegal recovery tactics by bank are actionable in civil court and with RBI.

case_summary: My land mortgage was transferred to another bank without my knowledge.
reasoning: Unauthorized transfer of mortgage requires civil court challenge.

case_summary: Moneylender forcibly took my land documents claiming I defaulted on informal loan.

case_summary: Cooperative bank attached my land for a loan taken by someone else using my documents.
